description_long: This is a medium-sized, semi-hemispherical bowl with a smooth, continuous curvature and a wide open top. The exterior surface appears to be made of a light gray, stone-like material with subtle horizontal striations, giving it a slightly textured, matte finish. The bowl has a uniform thickness and no visible handles, feet, or decorative elements, emphasizing a minimalist and utilitarian design. Its interior is not visible in these views, but it is likely consistent with the exterior in both color and material. The overall form is symmetrical, with a flat base that allows it to rest stably on flat surfaces. This type of bowl would be suitable for serving or holding items in both indoor and outdoor urban environments.
description: A minimalist, light gray stone-like bowl with a smooth, semi-hemispherical shape and subtle surface texture. It has a wide open top and no decorative features.
description_view_0: The bowl is seen from the side, showing its wide, curved profile and smooth, unadorned surface.
description_view_1: The bowl is viewed from the narrow edge, revealing its thin profile and symmetrical curvature.
description_view_2: This view mirrors view 0, displaying the opposite side of the bowl with the same wide, curved profile.
description_view_3: Similar to view 1, this shows the bowl from the edge, emphasizing its thinness and even curvature.
attribute_location: urban park, public plaza, or outdoor dining area
attribute_context_of_use: serving or holding food, snacks, or decorative items
